video:video.video:title: Dancing Queen / ABBA
video:video.video:description:
"Dancing Queen" is one of the timeless Europop songs by the Swedish group ABBA, released in 1976 as the lead single from their album Arrival. 🎵
Written by: Benny Andersson / Björn Ulvaeus / Stig Anderson Produced by: Benny Andersson / Björn Ulvaeus Piano Cover by: Francesco Parrino Video Recording & Post Production: Ekin Yüce
"Dancing Queen", İsveçli grup ABBA'nın Europop türündeki zamansız şarkılarından biri… 1976 yılında yayımlanan Arrival albümünün çıkış parçası. 🎵
Söz ve Müzik: Benny Andersson / Björn Ulvaeus / Stig Anderson Yapımcı: Benny Andersson / Björn Ulvaeus Düzenleme: Francesco Parrino Video Kayıt & Kurgu: Ekin Yüce
"Dancing Queen" è una delle canzoni Europop senza tempo del gruppo svedese ABBA, pubblicata nel 1976 come singolo principale del loro album Arrival. 🎵
Testo e Musica: Benny Andersson / Björn Ulvaeus / Stig Anderson Prodotto da: Benny Andersson / Björn Ulvaeus Cover per piano di: Francesco Parrino Registrazione video e post produzione: Ekin Yüce
#piano #

video:video.video:title: Handel / Minuet in G Minor
video:video.video:description:
Arranged by Wilhelm Kempff (1895-1991). He was a German pianist, teacher and composer. His student “İdil Biret” has recorded a CD of his piano works.
Piece: Minuet in G Minor Composed by: George Frideric Handel Arranged by: Wilhelm Kempff Painting by: Arzu Yazıcı Art Gallery: Lucafineart Video Recording & Post Production: Ekin Yüce
Bu eser Alman piyanist, öğretmen ve besteci Wilhelm Kempff tarafından düzenlenmiştir. Öğrencisi “İdil Biret” onun piyano eserlerini içeren bir CD kaydetmiştir.
Eser: Minuet in G Minor Besteci: George Frideric Handel Düzenleme: Wilhelm Kempff Ressam: Arzu Yazıcı Sanat Galerisi: Lucafineart Video Kayıt ve Post Prodüksiyon: Ekin Yüce
#piano #piyano #pianomusic #pianosolo #pianomusic #classicalmusic #baroque #handel #relaxingmusic #grandpiano
Would you like to follow the new videos please subscribe to my channel. Yeni videolarımdan haberdar olmak isterseniz kanalıma üye olmayı unutmayınız.
🎹Steinway&Sons B211

video:video.video:title: Now We Are Free / Gladiator
video:video.video:description:
These pieces are not just one of my all-time favorites but to me profound musical masterpieces.
Song: Now We Are Free from the movie “Gladiator” Composed by: Hans Zimmer Pianocover by: Patrik Pietschmann Ceramic Artist :Riella Video & Post Production: Ekin Yüce
Bu eserler, benim için yalnızca tüm zamanların favorileri değil; aynı zamanda derin anlamlarıyla ruhuma dokunan gerçek müzikal başyapıtlar.
Şarkı: Now We Are Free / Gladyatör film müziği Besteci: Hans Zimmer Düzenleme: Patrik Pietschmann Seramik sanatçısı: Riella Video Kayıt ve Post Prodüksiyon: Ekin Yüce
#piyano #piano #pianomusic #pianosolo #gladiator #moviesoundtrack #filmmusic#hanszimmer
Would you like to follow the new videos please subscribe to my channel. Yeni videolarımdan haberdar olmak isterseniz kanalıma abone olmayı unutmayınız.
🎹 Steinway&Sons B211

video:video.video:title: Bach / Prelude in C Major
video:video.video:description:
Bach is both the master of complexity and simplicity. Simple yet so beautiful.
Composed by: J.S.Bach Piece: Prelude in C Major, BWV 846 Painting by: Mübin Orhon( 1924-1981) Video recording & Post production: Ekin Yüce
Johann Sebastian Bach, hem karmaşıklığın hem de sadeliğin ustasıdır. Onun müziği, yalın bir güzellikle derin bir anlam taşıyor.
Besteci: J.S. Bach Eser: Do Majör Prelüd, BWV 846 Tablo: Mübin Orhon (1924-1981) Video Kayıt ve Post-Prodüksiyon: Ekin Yüce
#piyano #piano #pianomusic #pianosolo #johannsebastianbach #classicalmusic
Would you like to follow the new videos please subscribe to my channel Yeni videolarımdan haberdar olmak isterseniz, kanalıma abone olmayı unutmayınız.
🎹Steinway&Sons B211

video:video.video:title: Imagine / John Lennon
video:video.video:description:
An immortal classic. “Imagine all the people living life in peace”🙏
Song: Imagine Composed by: John Lennon Pianocover by: Francesco Parrino Painting by: Yıldız Asangalı/Field of Flowers Art Gallery: Lucafineart Video recording & Post production: Ekin Yüce
#johnlennonimagine#piano #pianomusic#pianosolo
Would you like to follow the new videos please subscribe to my channel
🎹Steinway&Sons B211

video:video.video:title: The Heart Asks Pleasure First / Michael Nyman
video:video.video:description:
Among the film music genre there are some piano gems and this is one of them. Michael Nyman’s score to the 1993 Jane Campion film “The Piano”
Composed by: Michael Nyman Painting by: Arzu Yazıcı Art Gallery: Lucafineart Video recording & Post production: Ekin Yüce
#piano#art#pianomusic#filmmusic#pianosolo#moviesoundtrack#michaelnyman#TheHeartAsksPleasureFirst#ThePiano#musicartist#passion
Would you like to follow the new videos please subscribe to my channel
🎹Steinway & Sons B211

video:video.video:title: My Heart Will Go On / Titanic
video:video.video:description:
“My Heart Will Go On” is recorded by Celine Dion and is the main theme song of the 1997 blockbuster film “Titanic”. The song became Dion’s biggest hit and is considered to be her signature song.
Song: My Heart Will Go On Composed by: James Horner Pianocover: Katherine Cordova(intro) Patrik Pietschmann Artistic Print: Lucafineart Video Recording & Post Production: Ekin Yüce
#piano #pianomusic #filmmusic#moviesoundtrack #titanic #celinedion #MyHeartWillGoOn
Would you like to follow the new videos please subscribe to my channel.
🎹Piano Steinway&Sons B211

video:video.video:title: Down By The River / Baldur's Gate 3
video:video.video:description:
“Down By The River” is a beautiful song from the soundtrack of Baldur’s Gate 3.
Composed by: Borislav Slavov Pianocover by: Grim Cat Piano Digital Art by: Ali Murat Susuz Kaftan designed by : My dear mother “Zihniye Aral”
To follow the new videos please subscribe to my channel.
#baldursgate3 #baldursgate #pianist # #gamemusic #pianosolo #pianocover #steinway #pianoplayer #relaxingmusic
🎹 Piano Steinway & Sons B211

video:video.video:title: Asturias (Leyenda)
video:video.video:description:
Asturias is a musical work by the Spanish composer and pianist Isaac Albeniz( 1860-1909).It was originally written for the piano and is the most frequently performed work of Albeniz.
Digital Art: Ali Murat Susuz
For the new videos please subscribe to my channel.
#asturias #pianoplayer #pianosolo #steinway #spanishmusic #pianist#albeniz #pianomusic
🎹 Piano Steinway & Sons B211

video:video.video:title: Can't Help Falling in Love
video:video.video:description:
“Can’t Help Falling in Love” is recorded by ELVIS PRESLEY for the album “Blue Hawaii” (1961) It is still Elvis’ most popular “love song”.
Written by: George David Weiss Hugo Peretti Luigi Creatore Pianocover by: Francesco Parrino Digital Art by: AliMurat Susuz
Would you like to follow the new videos please subscribe to my channel.
#elvispresley#pianoplayer #pianist #pianosolo #steinway #steinwayandsons #piyano #filmmusic #pianocover#musician #musica
🎹 Piano Steinway & Sons B211

video:video.video:title: Chariots of Fire
video:video.video:description:
The Oscar winning movie soundtrack “Chariots of Fire” was composed by Vangelis in 1981. The film is considered as one of the greatest British films ever made.
Song: Chariots of Fire Composed by: Vangelis Papathanasiou Pianocover: Francesco Parrino Artistic Print: Lucafineart

video:video.video:title: Hababam Sınıfı / Melih Kibar
video:video.video:description:
Hüzün ve neşe birarada…
Hababam Sınıfı Müzik: Melih Kibar Düzenleme: Vüsal Namazlı
Melih Kibar birçok film ve oyun müziğine de imza attı.Bunların en önemlisi 1975’te yayınlanan “ Hababam Sınıfı” filmine yaptığı müzik oldu. Bu şarkı ile Altın Portakal Film Müziği ödülünü aldı.
#pianosolo #pianocover #pianoarrangement #pianoplayer #pianogram #pianomusic #melihkibar #hababamsınıfı #filmmüziği #filmmusiccomposer
Yeni videoları takip etmek istiyorsanız kanalıma üye olun…
🎹 Piyano Yamaha C1 SH
